module.name: common
module.purpose: Shared interfaces used across the second-generation source tree, including typed TOML configuration, chat user messages, and shared channel errors.

childModules.name: channel
childModules.purpose: Shared channel error type used by client and agent session/task endpoints.

childModules.name: config
childModules.purpose: Strongly typed single-entry TOML configuration loader with alias and credential resolution.

childModules.name: message
childModules.purpose: Shared user message trait, user message type enum, and chat message payload type exchanged between client and agent.
